summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Velstrax. All 17 pytest cases passed (100%). Verified root endpoint, JWT auth flow (login/me/logout, cookie + Bearer), public + protected settings, portfolio CRUD with full auth gating, contact form submission with Resend email integration (returned valid id), invalid email 422 validation, admin contacts listing. Verified no _id leaks in any response. Verified httpOnly cookie attributes on login. Resend email delivery confirmed (id returned in backend log).

minor.issue: No 404 path tested explicitly for already-deleted id (covered indirectly via PUT 404 after delete)
CORS_ORIGINS="*" combined with allow_credentials=true is technically invalid per CORS spec — browsers may reject credentialed requests. Consider listing explicit origins.
No brute-force lockout implemented (5-fail lock recommended per auth playbook). Not requested in spec but worth noting.

action_items: Consider replacing CORS_ORIGINS="*" with explicit allowed origins since allow_credentials=true (browser will reject wildcard with credentials).
Optional: add brute-force lockout (5 failed attempts) per auth playbook for production hardening.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS allow_origins="*" with allow_credentials=true is incompatible with credentialed (cookie) requests in browsers — restrict origins explicitly in production.
server.py: bcrypt hash, JWT with 8h expiry, httpOnly+secure+samesite=none cookie correctly configured.
server.py: seed_admin idempotent and updates hash if password changed — good.
server.py: All Mongo queries exclude _id via projection — no leaks confirmed.
server.py: Resend send wrapped in asyncio.to_thread — good non-blocking pattern; failure caught and logged without breaking request.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created. Test created+deleted one TEST_ portfolio item; contacts collection has 1 test submission (tester@example.com) — minor residue acceptable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified. Resend integration works (email_sent=true, id returned). Cookie auth + Bearer fallback both functional. The pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_velstrax_backend.py can be reused for regression.
